summary: Iteration 44: PayPal Integration & Go-Live Preparation Testing. All 10 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend testing confirmed PayPal is correctly disabled when no keys configured. CORS updated for semanticvision.ai, email sender updated to hello@semanticvision.ai.
critical_code_review_comments: PayPal integration is structurally complete with proper disabled state when keys not configured
CORS properly configured for semanticvision.ai domain in server.py
Email sender correctly updated to 'Semantic Vision <hello@semanticvision.ai>' in services.py and auth.py
PayPal routes (paypal.py) properly return 500 'PayPal not configured' when PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID is empty
Frontend WalletTab.jsx correctly conditionally renders PayPal button only when paypalConfig.enabled is true

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login, Wallet Tab, Admin Dashboard all working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: PayPal integration is ready but disabled by default (no keys). When PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID and PAYPAL_SECRET are configured, PayPal button will appear in WalletTab alongside Stripe. Frontend correctly shows only Card/Stripe toggle when PayPal disabled. Admin dashboard shows 68 parents, 13 teachers, 22 students.

verified_paypal_routes.GET /api/paypal/config: PASSED - Returns {client_id: '', enabled: false} when no keys set
verified_paypal_routes.POST /api/paypal/create-order: PASSED - Returns 500 'PayPal not configured' when no keys

frontend_verification.wallet_tab: PASSED - Shows balance, packages, Card/Stripe toggle
frontend_verification.wallet_paypal_hidden: PASSED - PayPal button NOT shown (correctly disabled)
frontend_verification.admin_dashboard: PASSED - Shows stats: 68 parents, 13 teachers, 22 students

go_live_readiness.paypal_integration: Ready - will enable automatically when keys are provided

mocked_apis.note: PayPal API calls are real but disabled (no keys configured). All other APIs are live.
